name: crew
description: The multi-person shared-workspace layer on top of desk: read-across/write-own desks, the facts/perspectives/decisions attribution taxonomy, the conflict-safe write protocol, and perspective queries.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-person shared-workspace collaboration on the desk substrate.
interface.longDescription: Crew packages the multiplayer layer for a team running the desk substrate in one shared repo: read-across/write-own desk subtrees, the facts-vs-perspectives-vs-decisions attribution taxonomy, the conflict-safe write protocol, and perspective queries (what would a given person think, what's agreed vs just a fact). Vendor-neutral; layers on top of desk.
defaultPrompt: What would this teammate think about X?
What has the team actually decided about X?
What's just fact here versus someone's perspective?
